task: I need to send a quick note to a couple of coworkers about a process change we’re rolling out tomorrow. Can you help me draft something clear and easy to read for a busy workday?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a short, clear draft you can send:

**Hi [Names],**  
Just a quick heads-up that we’re rolling out a process change starting tomorrow. Please follow the new steps going forward and let me know if anything is unclear. I’ll help answer questions as we get started.

Thanks,  
[Your Name]

If you want, I can also make it:
- a little more casual,
- more formal, or
- specific to the exact process change.

user_simulator.text:
Close, but a little too generic. I need it to sound like a real work note, not a template.

Make it tighter and more specific about the change starting tomorrow, and keep it plain. A couple lines is enough. If you can, give me one version that sounds professional and one that sounds more casual.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here are two tighter versions you can use and adjust with the actual process name:

**Professional:**  
Hi [Names], just a heads-up that starting tomorrow we’re moving to the new [process name] steps. Please use the updated process from that point on, and let me know if anything comes up.

**More casual:**  
Hi [Names], quick note — starting tomorrow we’re using the new [process name] process. Please follow the updated steps from then on, and reach out if anything’s unclear.

If you want, I can also make it sound more like a shop-floor note or add the exact change in plain language.

user_simulator.text:
Still a little generic. The change is that starting tomorrow we’re logging inspections in the new digital form instead of the paper sheet. Keep it short, plain, and real.

Professional: Hi [Names], starting tomorrow, please use the new digital inspection form for all checks instead of the paper sheet. If you run into any issues, let me know.

More casual: Hi [Names], quick note — tomorrow we switch to the digital inspection form, so use that instead of the paper sheet. Holler if anything looks off.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here are tighter versions that sound more like a real work note:

**Professional:**  
Hi [Names], starting tomorrow, please log all inspections in the new digital form instead of the paper sheet. Let me know if you run into any issues.

**More casual:**  
Hi [Names], quick note — starting tomorrow, use the digital inspection form instead of the paper sheet for inspections. Let me know if anything comes up.

If you want, I can make them even more blunt or more natural depending on who you’re sending it to.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short, plain, and not dressed up too much. The professional one is fine.
